query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN squareFeet IS NOT NULL AND squareFeet > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_sqft,
  SUM(CASE WHEN yearBuilt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_year,
  SUM(CASE WHEN bedrooms IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_beds,
  SUM(CASE WHEN propertyType IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_type
FROM sales
LIMIT 1;

  SUM(CASE WHEN squareFeet IS NOT NULL AND squareFeet > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_sqft,
  SUM(CASE WHEN yearBuilt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_year,
  SUM(CASE WHEN bedrooms IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_beds,
  SUM(CASE WHEN propertyType IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_type
FROM sales
